items.title: Pete Nance, who just had a guarantee for this season declined, just re-signed with the Bucks on another 2-year minimum deal. The club holds an option for 2027-28.
items.author: Jim Owczarski
items.body_excerpt: Pete Nance, who just had a guarantee for this season declined, just re-signed with the Bucks on another 2-year minimum deal. The club holds an option for 2027-28.
